---
title: "Data & Outputs"
toc: true
---

The EUR_DATA collection provides structured, analysis-ready datasets on European
political institutions. Each dataset is released with reproducible pipeline code,
a column-level codebook, and a test suite. All data is licensed
[CC-BY-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) (the euandi dataset
additionally requires crediting its original authors — see that section).

## Commission Formation (2024-2029)

The formation of the second von der Leyen Commission, from the June 2024
European Parliament elections to the adoption of the 2025 Commission Work
Programme. Six interlinked tables, all keyed on a three-letter `commissioner_id`.

| Table | Rows | What it captures |
|-------|-----:|------------------|
| `commissioners` | 27 | The College: portfolio, party, gender, and DG assignments |
| `mission_letter_commitments` | 721 | Policy commitments from 26 presidential mission letters |
| `hearings` | 26 | Confirmation hearing dates, committees, and outcomes |
| `investiture_vote` | 688 | MEP-level roll-call votes on the College (27 Nov 2024) |
| `work_programme_items` | 127 | Items from the four annexes of the CWP 2025 |
| `formation_timeline` | 13 | Key institutional milestones (250-day span) |

**Downloads:**
[commissioners](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/commissioners.csv) ·
[commitments](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/mission_letter_commitments.csv) ·
[hearings](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/hearings.csv) ·
[investiture_vote](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/investiture_vote.csv) ·
[work_programme_items](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/work_programme_items.csv) ·
[formation_timeline](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output/formation_timeline.csv)

Every table is also available as XLSX in the same
[folder](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/tree/main/datasets/commission_formation/data/output).

**Documentation:**
[Dataset README](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/README.md) ·
[Codebook](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/commission_formation/CODEBOOK.md)

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
A citable DOI for this dataset is minted via Zenodo on each release. The DOI
will appear here once the first release is published.
:::

### Explore the data

The charts below are interactive: hover for exact values.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
voteData = FileAttachment("assets/charts/vote_by_group.csv").csv({typed: true})
commitData = FileAttachment("assets/charts/commitments_by_commissioner.csv").csv({typed: true})
annexData = FileAttachment("assets/charts/wp_by_annex.csv").csv({typed: true})
timelineData = FileAttachment("assets/charts/timeline.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

#### Investiture vote by EP political group

The Parliament approved the College by 370 votes to 282, with 36 abstentions.
The chart shows how each political group split.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 70,
  marginBottom: 40,
  x: {label: "MEPs", grid: true},
  y: {label: null, domain: [...new Set(voteData.map(d => d.ep_party_group))]},
  color: {domain: ["for", "against", "abstain"], range: ["#2c7fb8", "#d73027", "#969696"], legend: true},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(voteData, {
      y: "ep_party_group",
      x: "count",
      fill: "vote",
      order: ["for", "against", "abstain"],
      tip: true
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```

#### Mission-letter commitments per commissioner

1057 commitments were extracted from the 26 mission letters: 440 high-confidence
(from bullet-point lists) and 617 medium-confidence (from directive sentences and
legislative references).

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 150,
  marginBottom: 40,
  width: 800,
  height: 560,
  x: {label: "Commitments", grid: true},
  y: {label: null, sort: {y: "x", reduce: "sum", reverse: true}},
  color: {domain: ["high", "medium"], range: ["#1a9850", "#a6d96a"], legend: true},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(commitData, {
      y: "commissioner_name",
      x: "count",
      fill: "confidence",
      order: ["high", "medium"],
      tip: true
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```

#### Commission Work Programme 2025 by annex

127 items across the four annexes of the work programme adopted on 11 February 2025.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 180,
  marginBottom: 40,
  x: {label: "Items", grid: true},
  y: {label: null, domain: annexData.map(d => d.label)},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(annexData, {y: "label", x: "count", fill: "#542788", tip: true}),
    Plot.text(annexData, {y: "label", x: "count", text: "count", dx: 12, fontWeight: "bold"}),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```

#### Formation timeline

From the European Parliament elections (6 June 2024) to the adoption of the
Commission Work Programme (11 February 2025).

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 40,
  marginRight: 20,
  marginBottom: 50,
  height: 200,
  x: {label: null, type: "utc", grid: true},
  color: {legend: true, label: "Event type"},
  marks: [
    Plot.ruleY([0]),
    Plot.dot(timelineData, {
      x: d => new Date(d.date),
      y: 0,
      fill: "event_type",
      r: 6,
      tip: {format: {x: true, y: false}},
      channels: {event: "event_name", institution: "institution"}
    })
  ]
})
```

## euandi 2024 (European Parliament election)

Voting Advice Application expert coding for the June 2024 European Parliament
election: where Irish parties and candidates, and the EU-level party families,
placed themselves on 36 policy statements. Two parallel datasets (`ie_*`, `eu_*`),
final placement only.

| Table | Rows | What it captures |
|-------|-----:|------------------|
| `ie_parties` | 19 | Irish parties (13) + independent candidates (6) |
| `ie_statements` | 36 | The policy-statement battery (Ireland wording) |
| `ie_positions` | 684 | Each entity's final position on each statement |
| `ie_salience` | 57 | Each entity's three most salient statements |
| `eu_parties` | 10 | EU-level political party families |
| `eu_statements` | 36 | The statement battery (EU wording) |
| `eu_positions` | 360 | Each family's final position on each statement |
| `eu_salience` | 30 | Each family's three most salient statements |

**Downloads (Ireland):**
[ie_parties](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/data/output/ie_parties.csv) ·
[ie_statements](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/data/output/ie_statements.csv) ·
[ie_positions](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/data/output/ie_positions.csv) ·
[ie_salience](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/data/output/ie_salience.csv) —
**EU-level:**
[eu_parties](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/data/output/eu_parties.csv) ·
[eu_statements](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/data/output/eu_statements.csv) ·
[eu_positions](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/data/output/eu_positions.csv) ·
[eu_salience](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/data/output/eu_salience.csv)

**Documentation:**
[Dataset README](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/README.md) ·
[Codebook](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/CODEBOOK.md) ·
[Summary & figures](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/election_data/SUMMARY.md)

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Source & attribution.** Derived from the **euandi 2024** Voting Advice
Application coding (euandi 2024 team, European University Institute), published
under CC BY 4.0 via [EUI Cadmus](https://cadmus.eui.eu/entities/publication/6bd21956-5731-4a7b-be18-c24bba63a2aa).
Redistributed under CC BY 4.0 with attribution to the original authors.
:::

The position matrix below shows every Irish party and candidate (rows, ordered
by similarity) against all 36 statements; the colour is the coded position.

![Irish parties: final positions on 36 statements](datasets/election_data/figures/ie_position_heatmap.png)

![Irish parties: distribution of final positions](datasets/election_data/figures/ie_position_distribution.png)

## Commission Agenda Implementation

How far has the Commission delivered the legislative agenda it set itself? Each
planned agenda item is linked to its real legislative fate via the EP Open Data
API and EUR-Lex, built as a **time series** (each status row is dated). This
release ships **Phase 1**: the automated Annex IV procedure status and the term
corpus; Annex I links and evaluation outcomes are scaffolded for manual curation.

| Table | Rows | What it captures |
|-------|-----:|------------------|
| `agenda_items` | 190 | The agenda spine: every CWP item + 63 legislative commitments |
| `procedure_references` | 38 | Procedure references parsed from the agenda |
| `procedure_status` | 38 | Dated status snapshot per procedure (the core deliverable) |
| `term_legislative_output` | 169 | Baseline corpus of all 2024-2026 term procedures |
| `evaluations` | 37 | Annex II/III evaluation tracking (curated) |

**Downloads:**
[agenda_items](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/agenda_implementation/data/output/agenda_items.csv) ·
[procedure_references](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/agenda_implementation/data/output/procedure_references.csv) ·
[procedure_status](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/agenda_implementation/data/output/procedure_status.csv) ·
[term_legislative_output](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/agenda_implementation/data/output/term_legislative_output.csv) ·
[evaluations](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/agenda_implementation/data/output/evaluations.csv)

**Documentation:**
[Dataset README](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/agenda_implementation/README.md) ·
[Codebook](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/agenda_implementation/CODEBOOK.md) ·
[Summary & figures](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/datasets/agenda_implementation/SUMMARY.md)

The status of the agenda-linked procedures, read against the full procedure
ladder. As of the snapshot, all resolved procedures sit at first reading and none
have been adopted: the Annex IV items are old proposals pending withdrawal, and a
Commission withdrawal is not an EP procedure stage.

![Status of agenda-linked procedures](datasets/agenda_implementation/figures/procedure_status.png)

---

*Generated from the dataset pipelines; figures are reproducible via each
dataset's `make_summary.py`. More datasets will be added as the project develops.*
